name: scipy-pro
description: Epistemic engineering plugin organized around the CS disciplines required to build systems for structured understanding — grounded in framework source code and the research_api epistemic engine. Provides 4 workflow commands (/reason, /graph, /encode, /gather) and 12 domain-expert agents across information retrieval, NLP, knowledge representation, graph theory, causal inference, probabilistic reasoning, self-organization, program synthesis, and software architecture.
